turns.content:
1	from flask import Flask, request, jsonify
   2	
   3	app = Flask(__name__)
   4	users_db = {}
   5	
   6	@app.route('/register', methods=['POST'])
   7	def register():
   8	    data = request.get_json()
   9	    username = data.get('username', '')
  10	    password = data.get('password', '')
  11	    users_db[username] = password
  12	    return jsonify({'status': 'created'}), 201
  13	
  14	@app.route('/login', methods=['POST'])
  15	def login():
  16	    data = request.get_json()
  17	    username = data.get('username')
  18	    password = data.get('password')
  19	    if users_db.get(username) == password:
  20	        return jsonify({'status': 'ok'})
  21	    return jsonify({'error': 'invalid credentials'}), 401
